---
title: "Muhammad Ahmad Hassan"
description: |
  **BSc Economics and Politics**  
  University of Essex
author: null
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```



```{=html}
<div class="profile-layout">
  <div class="profile-left">
    <img src="profile.jpg.jpeg" class="profile-photo" alt="Portrait of Muhammad Ahmad Hassan">

    <h2 class="profile-name">Muhammad Ahmad Hassan</h2>

    <div class="profile-links">
      <a class="btn" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahmadhassan1/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a class="btn" href="https://github.com/mh24952" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
      <a class="btn" href="mailto:mh24952@essex.ac.uk">Email</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="profile-right">
  
```


## About Me

I am a final-year BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics student at the University of Essex with a strong interest in how markets function and how political institutions shape economic outcomes.

Beyond my academic work, I enjoy reading widely to gain new perspectives on global economic and political issues, and I play golf in my free time.

## Bio

My academic focus lies in quantitative analysis, political economy, and the interaction between markets and institutions. Through my studies, I have developed strong skills in statistical modelling, data analysis in R, and communicating empirical findings clearly and professionally.

## Education

**University of Essex**  
BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics *(Expected First Class)*  
September 2023 – May 2026

  </div>

</div>
